title: Patch skillful __require crash with createRequire polyfill
summary: Apply a one-line polyfill to @zenobius/opencode-skillful@1.2.5 dist/index.js to fix TypeError: __require is not a function. Replaces Bun-specific import.meta.require with Node.js createRequire(import.meta.url).
keyOutcomes: OpenCode Desktop loads skillful without crash
Zero changes to AGENTS.md or skill directories
risks: Bundled file import structure may conflict with polyfill
validationCriteria: skill_find returns skills from lazy vault
Original file backed up and recoverable
Patch diff documented for future re-application
closeoutNotes: Deterministic patch validation completed on 2026-05-26: backup, exact replacement, zero remaining import.meta.require, 3-line diff, Node import/syntax OK, metadata/ledger/index synchronized.
CLI smoke test completed on 2026-05-26: skillful plugin loaded under opencode CLI, discovered lazy-vault base path, registered 59 skills without the __require crash.

Live Desktop smoke test completed on 2026-05-26: Desktop started without __require crash, 60+ lazy-vault skills visible in session, skill_use loaded thinking-partner from lazy vault successfully. All validation criteria confirmed.
